location: On a corpse atop the Lower Leyndell rooftops, reached from the Avenue Balcony Site of Grace in Leyndell, Royal Capital. Only obtainable before Maliketh, the Black Blade is defeated — once he falls and the capital is buried in ash, this rooftop route becomes unreachable.
tactics: From Avenue Balcony grace, head down and out onto the rooftops, then jump/climb northeast across several roofs
The corpse sits on a roof to the southwest of the route — footing is tight and a bad jump can send you falling into the streets below
Time-limited: grab it before progressing far enough to reach Maliketh, or it's gone for that playthrough
The same general rooftop network also hides the separate Bolt of Gransax pickup — don't assume they're the same item
lore: Carved from dark timber into a blade-like silhouette, this longbow trades raw power for agility, letting its wielder loose arrows mid-jump or mid-roll — deceptively hard to use well despite the flashy handling.

builds.name: Agile Dex bow
builds.why: Despite being classified a longbow, it uses the light bow moveset (jump shots, roll shots, fast recovery), so pure Dex investment maximizes both damage and mobility
